query_text_ru: Назови 5 фильмов, жанра «криминальный фильм», из страны: США, 2015 года.
ask_validator_sparql:
ASK WHERE {
      BIND(wd:{ITEM} AS ?item)
      ?item wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q11424 .
      ?item wdt:P136 wd:Q959790 .
      ?item wdt:P495 wd:Q30 .
      ?item wdt:P577 ?date .
      BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) .
      FILTER(?year >= 2015 && ?year <= 2015) .
    }

sparql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE {
      ?item wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q11424 .
      ?item wdt:P136 wd:Q188473 .
      ?item wdt:P577 ?date .
      BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) .
      FILTER(?year >= 2021 && ?year <= 2024) .
      ?item wdt:P444 ?_score_raw .
      BIND(xsd:decimal(?_score_raw) AS ?_score) .
      FILTER(?_score >= 6.8) .
      SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "ru,en". }
    }
    LIMIT 100

ask_validator_sparql:
ASK WHERE {
      BIND(wd:{ITEM} AS ?item)
      ?item wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q11424 .
      ?item wdt:P136 wd:Q93204 .
      ?item wdt:P577 ?date .
      BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) .
      FILTER(?year >= 2022 && ?year <= 2024) .
    }

query_text_ru: Назови 5 математиков, которые получали награду «Медаль Филдса» в период 1950–2020.
sparql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT ?person ?personLabelRu WHERE {
      ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
      ?person wdt:P106/wdt:P279* wd:Q170790 .
      ?person p:P166 ?st .
      ?st ps:P166 wd:Q28835 .
      ?st pq:P585 ?t .
      BIND(YEAR(?t) AS ?ay) .
      FILTER(?ay >= 1950 && ?ay <= 2020) .
      ?person wikibase:sitelinks ?sl .
      FILTER(?sl >= 1) .
      ?person rdfs:label ?personLabelRu FILTER(LANG(?personLabelRu)='ru') .
    }
    LIMIT 300
ask_validator_sparql:

      BIND(wd:{ITEM} AS ?person)
      ?person wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q5 .
      ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
      ?person wdt:P106/wdt:P279* wd:Q170790 .
      ?person p:P166 ?st .
      ?st ps:P166 wd:Q28835 .
      ?st pq:P585 ?t .
      BIND(YEAR(?t) AS ?ay) .

      ?person wikibase:sitelinks ?sl .
      FILTER(?sl >= 1) .
      ?person rdfs:label ?personLabelRu FILTER(LANG(?personLabelRu)='ru') .
    }
